steps.title: Add all four sides
steps.content:
Fencing along each edge means using the perimeter of the rectangle. There are two sides of length $x$ and two sides of width $y$.
$$x+x+y+y=2x+2y$$

steps.title: Set the total length
steps.content:
Malia used $58$ feet of fencing total, so the perimeter expression must equal $58$.
$$2x+2y=58$$
The other product choices describe area, not fencing around the edges. The answer is A.
